---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the workflow or limitation you're running into. Focus on the problem, not the solution. -->
<!-- e.g. "When I have more than one practitioner, there's no way to..." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you like to see? How would it work? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Have you found workarounds? Are there other ways to solve this? -->

## Context

<!-- Your setup: country, practice type, number of practitioners, etc. -->
<!-- This helps assess whether the feature generalises or is very specific to one setup. -->
